person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: Alix I Capet de Dreux, Viscountess of Châteaudun, Dame of Saint-Calais, Dame of Mondoubleau, was born 1254 to Robert I de Châteaudun (1217-1264) and Clémence de Châteaudun (1229-1259) and died 1296 of unspecified causes. She married Raoul II de Clermont (1245-1302) 1267.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Dreux於1255年出生在法國崔艾-吉洛易a奧度時，她的父親Robert de Dreux38歲，母親Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun35歲。她於1268年與Raoul II of Clermont結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Dreux was born in 1255, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, her father, Robert de Dreux, was 38 and her mother, Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun, was 35. She married Raoul II of Clermont in 1268. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1296, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Dreux est née en 1255, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, son père, Robert de Dreux, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul II of Clermont en 1268. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1296, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Dreux 1255 in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Dreux 38 und ihre Mutter Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun 35. Sie hat 1268 Raoul II of Clermont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1296 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Dreux è nata il nel 1255 nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Dreux, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Raoul II of Clermont nel 1268. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1296, nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Dreuxが1255年にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで生まれた時，父Robert de Dreuxは38歳，母Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudunは35歳であった。1268年にRaoul II of Clermontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Dreux(이)가 1255년 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Dreux(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1268년 Raoul II of Clermont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Dreux nasceu em 1255, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, seu pai, Robert de Dreux, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul II of Clermont em 1268. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1296, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Dreux родилась в 1255 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Dreux было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul II of Clermont в 1268 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1296 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Dreux nació en 1255, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, su papá, Robert de Dreux, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Raoul II of Clermont en 1268. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1296, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 41 años.
